name: Heavy Cavalry
flavor: Magestone (Mage Knight) — breaks a line on the charge. New archetype: well-armoured but over-committed (lower Life). figureCandidates from Mage Knight: Resurrection (minisgallery.com) — mounts, beasts and heavy melee; role assignment editorial.

specialAction.name: Cavalry Charge
specialAction.summary: Make a straight-line Move as far as the cord allows, then immediately make 1 Attack with +1 reroll. The charge is your whole action for the turn.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, make 1 Move after this Attack (ride them down).

figureCandidates.name: Dwarven Axeshield
figureCandidates.roleFit: Heavy, well-armoured melee if you want a tankier charger.

figureCandidates.name: Cavalier Freeblade
figureCandidates.roleFit: A mounted cavalier — the truest Heavy Cavalry fit.

figureCandidates.name: Growlfang
figureCandidates.roleFit: A great beast charger for a centrepiece.
